scope: Replace orchestrator stub with LangGraph runner behind AGENTS_RUNTIME=langgraph

integration_points.note: LangGraph StateGraph implementation invokes StepQueue workflow and updates execution store
Feature-flag branch creates execution records and delegates to runWithLangGraph
Lifecycle helpers used by runtime for status/log updates
End-to-end parity polling of LangGraph executions

observations: runWithLangGraph already updates execution status to running before invoking StepQueue
Vitest uses a StateGraph stub to avoid heavy LangGraph runtime requirements
Failure handling happens both in runWithLangGraph and the /api/execute route
risks: Potential duplicate failure writes to the execution store
Detached async invocation could mask runtime exceptions if not surfaced in logs
next_steps: Add focused tests covering successful and failing LangGraph runs
Capture execution logs in assertions to guarantee serialization format
Update progress tracking and evidence after validations
